warning: DO NOT USE THESE KEYS IN PRODUCTION — test vectors only
header: AES-256-GCM vectors with fixed key and nonce. These reproduce the symmetric layer of the Cullis E2E hybrid envelope.

vectors.name: short_payload_no_seq
vectors.notes: AES-256-GCM. The trailing 16 bytes of the ciphertext are the GCM auth tag (Cullis follows the cryptography library convention of appending the tag).

vectors.name: long_payload_with_seq
vectors.notes: AES-256-GCM. The trailing 16 bytes of the ciphertext are the GCM auth tag (Cullis follows the cryptography library convention of appending the tag).
